name: maze of caves
description: I'm in a maze of caves
hints: Another maze room. Getting closer to the exit if you know the way.
N is the key direction here - it leads to room 28 which has the opening and bat guano.
E loops back to this room (27). Go N to reach the maze exit area.
N=28 (opening/guano). S=26. E=27 (self-loop). W=25. Go N to escape maze.
notes: Maze room. N=28 (maze exit with opening and guano). S=26. E=27 (self-loop). W=25. Go N to exit maze.
